method: Six-role strict audit consolidated from 156 raw judgments into 174 non-duplicate criteria.

milestones.title: Audit M1 - Evidence Integrity
milestones.description: Correctness, provenance, robustness, release, and security integrity

milestones.title: Audit M2 - Methodology v2
milestones.description: Measurement, inference, format, and external-validity improvements

milestones.title: Audit M3 - Publication Grade
milestones.description: Typing, maintainability, documentation, and publication polish

project.title: Data Format Lab - Strict Audit Closure
project.description: Issue-backed closure board for the 2026-07-19 strict audit.

saved_views.name: Data Format Lab - Ready for agent
Data Format Lab - Ready for human

items.evidence: Explicit glossary in `CONTEXT.md:9-22`; not fully enforced by separate adapter types.
Separate lanes and no cross-lane ranking in `CONTEXT.md:29-38`.
Pair-local registry and lane checks in `equivalence_compare.py:23-59`.
SQLite/DuckDB are not file-format ranking rows.
Robustness cannot change performance ranking.
Only `FULL_COMPARABLE` entries rank; aggregate publication sometimes omits this clearly.
Fixture runs are explicitly marked non-rankable.
Executable transitions are strong; global verification aggregation has a defect.
`FAILED`/`UNSUPPORTED` are retained and non-rankable.
Consistent doctrine in context, ADR, report and selection guide.
Exact schema exists, but only four Arrow types are supported.
Only string, float64, int64 and bool in `canonical.py:15-20`.
`verify_table()` rejects schema mismatch.
Nullable fields are checked; empty string is globally collapsed into NULL.
Stable JSON/SHA-256 process; limited to Python/JSON semantics.
Dataset-specific normalization for Stars fields remains in generic core.
`canonical_hash()` sorts rows, so permutations can pass conformance.
Standard JSON canonicality is not enforced; `allow_nan` remains default.
Schema, rows, hash and expected counts required before timing.
Exact result counts are checked.
Normalized result hashes exist, but ordering differences can be masked.
Head is order-sensitive, while canonical result evidence is order-insensitive.
Most adapters converge on `verify_table`; casting/read semantics vary.
Robustness avoids falsely calling arbitrary mutation acceptance silent corruption.
`perf_counter_ns` surrounds target invocation.
Each replicate is a subprocess.
10 processes, 5 warmups, 30 iterations; per-process summaries retained.
Implemented but no stabilization diagnostic justifies five warmups.
Fresh artifact invocation, not end-to-end cold application startup.
OS cache is not purged; correctly disclosed, but cold-read claims are unavailable.
One seeded job shuffle; replicate blocks are not interleaved.
No paired blocks, CPU governor, temperature or power-state control.
Fair jobs default to serial execution.
Worker count is recorded, but contention is not removed or modeled.
No affinity, cgroup, quota or bandwidth controls.
Artifact write is generally one preparation observation, not repeated inference.
Read, projection, simple filter and head only.
Same logical result, but pushdown and Arrow conversion differ by reader.
Measures format plus library plus reader implementation, not format alone.
Process-wide max RSS includes interpreter/source/expected tables; no baseline subtraction.
Validation does not contaminate measured invocation.
macOS ARM and Linux x86_64 are separate result sets.
Metrics exist, but target population and warm/fresh estimands are not formally stated.
Deterministic and tested.
Deterministic; only 30 within-process samples per process.
Useful descriptive spread is retained.
Rankings use point summaries without confidence intervals/effect thresholds.
Process p50/p95 samples are retained, though headline warm tables pool iterations.
Basic 2,000-sample percentile bootstrap over ten processes.
No coverage simulation, BCa, studentization or Monte Carlo error analysis.
Independent resampling misses a possible temporal-block pairing design.
+/-2/5/10% thresholds are explicit but not tied to user impact or noise.
Storage uses degenerate exact intervals despite documented writer nondeterminism.
No FWER/FDR/simultaneous intervals across metrics, operations and pairs.
No preregistered primary metric; any meaningful difference dominates pair verdict.
No power or precision analysis supports ten fresh processes.
No log-ratio, alternative robust summary or margin sensitivity output.
Claimed and summarized, but second-run raw evidence is not tracked for recalculation.
Exact artifact/logical bytes are separate from transport compression.
Consistent level-3 transport size; compression/decompression time absent.
Deterministic recursive logical size and tar transport calculation.
Strong component-level accounting in `formats/lance.py:43-52`.
Settings recorded; important physical defaults remain implicit.
Key physical controls are not systematically fixed across formats.
Same typed source and workload; useful equivalence pair.
Correctly treated as related variants.
Useful system comparison; defaults and reader behavior remain confounders.
Good row-serialization breadth and round-trip gate.
Correct lane, but engine/container/database design differences remain large.
Shared projection; taxonomy and schema overhead included.
Exact `o200k_base` and `cl100k_base` counts, not estimates.
Only two OpenAI encodings; no chat/tool framing or non-OpenAI tokenizer.
Common Compact TSV output for 5/10/20 results.
Index size and query metrics exist; substring truth is a limited relevance target.
Claim-specific work exists; broader scan superiority is not established.
Correctly `ADAPTED`; optional wheel still skipped in ordinary CI.
Failure conditions are retained without overclaiming upstream defects.
Pinned targets and artifacts are good; 900 seconds is validation-scale, not maturity evidence.
Immutable IDs, source SHA and canonical hash are consistently recorded.
Stars is strong; five newer cards are brief source notes.
Essential raw responses/pages/transformation provenance are missing for several datasets.
Frozen bytes reproduce; several derivations cannot be reconstructed from official source.
UCI/GeoNames are clear; NYC/OWID/Stars obligations remain qualified.
Release assets have compressed/decompressed hashes.
Six domains and varied row counts improve on Stars alone.
Five datasets repeat essentially the same five-operation template.
Maximum tested width is 13; rich sources are projected to 5-8 columns.
Four primitive types only.
Dates are mostly strings; no real temporal range/partition workload.
Absent.
Missing values are exercised, but empty string is not preserved distinctly.
Distinct counts, entropy, quantiles and text-length distributions are not published.
Expected counts span broad to selective predicates.
Thresholds are not preregistered or justified.
Mutable endpoint + offset pagination + no raw pages; manifest mentions keyset but code does not.
Strict field count; claimed sort is not visible in normalizer.
Single Apple-heavy user sample with heuristic labels.
Supports conditional flat-table claims only, not general data-format claims.
Small and comprehensible.
Public boundaries rely heavily on nested `dict` and string keys.
Illegal transitions are explicitly rejected and tested.
All adapters may be FAILED/UNSUPPORTED while run becomes `ROUNDTRIP_VERIFIED`.
Robustness is rich; ordinary profiles collapse broad exceptions into strings.
Signals and target outcomes are recorded.
Explicit timeout and cleanup-incomplete outcomes.
Strong in robustness; ordinary benchmark worker process groups are weaker.
Worker process can write broadly inside run directory.
No RLIMIT/cgroup/sandbox resource caps.
Concurrent drain, bounded tails and hashes.
Parent-managed evidence budget is good; arbitrary worker writes can bypass it.
Absolute, traversal and outside-run paths rejected.
Release and evidence paths reject symlink escapes.
Deterministic streaming tar.zst with path checks.
Broad unit/adversarial tests across lifecycle, adapters, crashes, paths and reports.
Fresh Nix run passed; two expected TsFile optional tests skipped.
TsFile can remain skipped in ordinary CI.
Strict checking covers only five production modules.
Blocking and fast, but deliberately narrow rule set.
Useful observation, non-blocking by design.
Nix, locks, lint, typing, tests, lane smoke and implementation audit.
No coverage threshold or mutation-testing evidence.
Repeated path/JSON/untyped-dict logic raises change risk.
Python/native/Rust environment is locked for declared systems.
Exact Python dependencies and frozen sync.
Commit, flake hash, platform, hardware, Python and package versions.
No machine-spanning ranking.
Governor, thermal state, filesystem and background load omitted.
Raw JSON is in release archives, not directly reviewable in repository.
No tracked v0.2 aggregate/six-dataset report; README points to v0.1.
Assets and SHA-256 sidecars exist and are manifest-linked.
Evidence includes commits after the RC tag target; per-shard provenance mitigates but does not cure discovery.
`pyproject.toml` remains `0.1.0` at `v0.2.0-rc1`.
Says benchmark assets will be appended after they already exist.
Strong methodology and quick-start documentation.
Still presents three lanes and omits current equivalence model.
Corrections, failures and unsupported paths are documented.
Third-party rights and prohibited inference are acknowledged.
Policies exist and one open bug is visible; full review-thread closure not re-audited.
Pages endpoint returns 404; no hosted current-result explorer.
Nix systems imply support; no explicit supported/unsupported platform table.
“Do not compare incomparable formats” is strong and memorable.
Evidence-first, lane-local, negative-result lab is distinctive.
Distinct combination; no comparison against existing benchmark products.
Data engineers/researchers are inferable, not directly framed.
No interviews, incidents, adoption or quantified decision cost.
Selection guide is useful to informed engineers.
Coherent research toolkit, but framework/report/guide identity competes.
No single demo command, hosted explorer or visual result path.
No dashboard, chart, screenshot or tracked visual asset.
Nix + uv is reproducible but heavy for a judge.
Old Markdown is readable; latest results require release archive inspection.
Commit/branch hints exist; README does not explain concrete Codex contributions.
No repository proof; tokenizer use is not GPT-5.6 use.
Current text overstates Lance meaning search, “bug rate,” and Rust non-use.
Candid but meandering and self-undermining for judges.
Strong Developer Tools fit; weak model-centric fit without usage proof.
Credible need, no traction or measurable outcome.
Non-trivial code, contracts, tests and evidence machinery.
Runnable CLI, not a complete judge-facing product experience.
Strongest official criterion after implementation.
Live Devpost project has an empty video URL.
Live state is `submission_draft`, `submitted_at` is null.

`work/build_revalidation_aggregate.py` and `work/finalize_revalidation.sh` generated the v0.2 aggregate but are ignored by the tracked `work/` rule. The public repository cannot regenerate the published aggregate.
Aggregate evidence points to `.data/revalidation-20260719/...`; the archive stores the same files under `revalidation-20260719/claims/...`, so the recorded paths do not resolve after extraction.
Nested pair manifests reference `artifacts/*.parquet`, `*.orc`, databases, and other encoded outputs, but the aggregate archive carries only nested manifest/results/report files.
The packager validates top-level result references, but aggregate evidence lives under `datasets[].evidence[]`; therefore broken nested paths and missing nested artifacts pass packaging.
A broad target-side `Exception` becomes `REJECTED`; `MUST_REJECT` and `MUST_NOT_CRASH` can therefore pass on a lab `NameError`, `TypeError`, or other implementation defect.
The gate fails only explicit CORE `FAIL`; an all-`INCOMPLETE` or all-`HARNESS_FAILED` CORE run can remain green, and the fixture omits most boundary families.
Live Dependabot reports two High alerts and one Medium alert for pinned `cbor2`/`msgpack`; green PR #223 exists but is unmerged.
GitHub reports `main` as unprotected, so required CI/review and force-push prevention are policy rather than enforced repository state.
The pair compares Parquet Zstd with ORC Zlib. It is useful as a configured-system comparison, not an isolated format-layout comparison.
Parquet uses column/filter pushdown while ORC reads the table and applies Arrow operations afterward; reader implementation and format effects are confounded.
Taxonomy bytes are counted, but the abbreviated `m,r,l,s,k,t,d` header has no counted mapping to full semantic field names; object JSONL is self-describing and array JSONL counts its full schema.
Vortex stress and TsFile query comparisons primarily assert returned row counts, not value/schema hashes, so equal counts can conceal wrong records.
